reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria en la vuelta a casa de la costa. Baños limpios y una oferta de comidas muy copada.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way home from the coast. Clean restrooms and a great selection of food.

Excellent service. A must-stop for dinner on the way back from the coast.

reviews.comment:
Como socio del ACA el sábado a la mañana sinceramente me sienti defraudado por el desinteres y mala atención de un playero al consultarle por un servicio, dejando de lado que el buen día no estaba en su vocabulario y mas siendo EL una persona mayor, si no queres trabajar mas andate y dale lugar a otro que seguro lo va hacer con más educación

(Translated by Google)
As an ACA member, on Saturday morning I honestly felt let down by the disinterest and poor service of a gas station attendant when I inquired about a service. Not to mention that "good morning" wasn't in his vocabulary, especially considering he was an older person. If you don't want to work anymore, leave and give the job to someone else who will surely do it with more courtesy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5MVVIWjZRM2xhYkdGWVVGbDRSVTE1YmxScGFsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena parada rutera. Buenas medialunas y palmeritas. Recontra recomendable. Buen lugar atencion y limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Great roadside stop. Delicious croissants and palmier pastries. Highly recommended. Good place, service, and cleanliness.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar y parada obligada para todos los viajeros de ruta 2.

Lo mejor su parque con juegos para niños y mesas para disfrutar al aire libre

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place and a must-stop for all travelers on Route 2.

The best part is its park with a playground and picnic tables for enjoying the outdoors.

reviews.comment:
El lugar esta bien, la atención es buena y rápida. Los baños limpios. El café ☕️ y las medialunas 🥐 ésta vez estaban bien, pero antes eran exquisitas.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, the service is good and fast. The bathrooms are clean. The coffee ☕️ and croissants 🥐 were okay this time, but they used to be delicious.
